name: Kimi K2.6
summary: Kimi K2.6 has reportedly outperformed Claude, GPT-5.5, and Gemini in a recent coding challenge, showcasing its capabilities in programming tasks.

name: OpenAI’s o1
summary: OpenAI’s o1 model demonstrated a 67% diagnostic accuracy in emergency triage, outperforming human doctors who achieved 50-55%.

name: DeepClaude
summary: DeepClaude is an advanced coding agent loop designed to enhance programming tasks, showcasing Anthropic's focus on coding capabilities.

name: Gemma 4
summary: Gemma 4 has introduced a decoupled attention mechanism that allows for improved performance in various tasks, enhancing its usability.

name: GLM-5V-Turbo
summary: GLM-5V-Turbo aims to provide a native foundation model for multimodal agents, enhancing their capabilities across various applications.
